posts.text: This is a reprehensible post for X to allow, targeting @s_m_marandi and putting a bounty on him. It is also a "Paid partnership." Imagine the outcry if a pro-Palestinian or pro-Iranian group did this with Israelis or Americans. Criminal charges would be filed.

lol


Dylan Byers (@DylanByers)

CNN has been experimenting with new formats this week, including Anderson in rolled-up sleeves, massive desk microphones, and a physical map, channeling early Edward R. Murrow-era broadcast....

Experiment will continue today with Jake Tapper broadcasting from his office.



— https://nitter.net/DylanByers/status/2035066179723956483#m

🧵 English translation of Iran's Supreme Leader's remarks on the Iranian new year. Mojtaba Khamenei says that he has, at times, taken taxis incognito and traveled through Tehran to hear from people: "I considered this kind of sampling superior to many opinion polls."


Arya Yadeghaar (@AryJeay)

Iran’s Leader, Seyyed Mojtaba Khamenei, has congratulated everyone on the new Iranian year:

FULL TEXT:

O Turner of hearts and eyes, O Director of night and day,
O Transformer of years and conditions, tr

Israelis recruited by Iran have distributed fliers and banners that contain discretely embedded images showing the logo of Iranian intelligence (MOIS), or stylized depictions of former IRGC commander Qassem Soleimani. 

An Iranian official said it “is a deliberate reminder that [we] too possess the capability to manipulate citizens on the Israeli side and carry out reciprocal actions.”

dropsitenews.com/p/iran-mini…

Last year, Israel witnessed a 400% increase in suspected and confirmed cases of Israelis performing espionage related activities for Iranian intelligence
dropsitenews.com/p/iran-mini…



jeremy scahill (@jeremyscahill)

“A shadow war has been underway for years between Iran on one side and the US & Israel on the other,” one of the Iranian officials told Drop Site. “No responsibility has ever been officially claimed nor is it likely to be.”
dropsitenews.com/p/iran-mini…
Wall Street Journal: "America’s Arab allies are now fuming that they don’t seem to have any influence with the Trump administration despite heavy investments of time and money."

🤔


Idrees Ali (@idreesali114)

WASHINGTON, March 19 (Reuters) - The U.S. may soon remove sanctions from Iranian oil that is stranded on tankers to help lift global supplies and reduce prices, U.S. Treasury Secretary Scott Bessent said on Thursday.

Speaker of Iran's parliament mocks US claims about destruction of missile launch capacity:


محمدباقر قالیباف | MB Ghalibaf (@mb_ghalibaf)

According to statements by Israeli and American military officials, 320% of Iran's missile launchers have been destroyed so far. However, Iran continues to launch missiles at a high rate

Now,the enemy aims to destroy up to 500% of them!

A unique achievement for the US military!



— https://nitter.net/mb_ghalibaf/status/2034583497214726583#m

Tulsi Gabbard has announced she is stepping down from her previously stated principles to spend more time aiding wars she claimed to oppose.

Iranian President Masoud Pezeshkian confirms Iran's intelligence chief was killed in an Israeli strike last night.


Masoud Pezeshkian (@drpezeshkian)

ترور ناجوانمردانه همکاران عزیزم اسماعیل خطیب، علی لاریجانی و عزیز نصیرزاده در کنار بعضی از اعضای خانواده و تیم همراهشان داغدارمان کرد. 
شهادت دو عضو کابینه و دبیر شعام و سرداران نظامی و بسیجی را به مردم بزرگ ایران تسلیت می‌گویم. مطمئنم راهشان محکم‌تر از قبل ادامه خواهد داشت.



— https://nitter.net/drpezeshkian/status/2034271068488130787#m

⚡The Devil in the Details of Trump’s "Final Proposal" for Gaza Ceasefire

A Hamas official accused Trump of aiding an Israeli “deception operation,” but the movement says it wants to bridge the gaps and make a deal.

We obtained the proposal. Details below:
www.dropsitenews.com/p/trump-neta...

"Letter from Gaza: The Nakba We Are Living Through"

Powerful story from Hamza Salha on how he and his family were forced to flee their home in the Jabaliya refugee camp in northern Gaza to head for an unknown fate as Israel expands its attacks.
www.dropsitenews.com/p/nakba-gaza...

⚡️Hamas Responds to Witkoff Gaza Proposal, Demands Trump Guarantee Israel Won’t Resume Genocide 

Drop Site obtained the new proposal, which Hamas drafted in consultation with a range of Palestinian factions. Full text of document and story below 🔽
www.dropsitenews.com/p/hamas-resp...

⚡️How Israel and Witkoff Are Trying to Strong-Arm Hamas Into a Deal That Does Not End the Genocide

A point-by-point breakdown of how the U.S. and Israel changed the deal Hamas said it made with Trump's envoys. 
www.dropsitenews.com/p/israel-ham...

⚡️Israel Expands Ethnic Cleansing Operations in Khan Younis 

As Israel intensifies its war of "conquest" and annihilation, Donya Abu Sitta reports from Khan Younis on the recent wave of Israeli attacks and forced displacement against Palestinians.
www.dropsitenews.com/p/israel-eth...

🚨Netanyahu: Gaza Aid Scheme Offers Israel Symbolic Cover to Finish the Genocide
www.dropsitenews.com/p/netanyahu-...

🚨 Hamas Says Steve Witkoff Personally Promised Gaza Blockade Would Be Lifted in Exchange for Edan Alexander 

The U.S. broke the deal, a senior Hamas official told me. “They threw it in the trash” and there has been “zero” progress on a Gaza ceasefire.
www.dropsitenews.com/p/witkoff-ha...

🚨Hamas says it had an understanding with the U.S. that after Hamas released Edan Alexander, humanitarian aid would begin entering the Gaza Strip immediately and a U.S. call would be made for a ceasefire and comprehensive negotiations. New reporting below:
www.dropsitenews.com/p/trump-neta...

🎥 WATCH | Drop Site co-founder @jeremyscahill.com spoke to Breaking Points this morning  about Trump bypassing Israel to speak directly with Hamas. In the clip below, he explains the context in which the agreement to release U.S.-Israeli soldier Edan Alexander was reached.

@krystalball.bsky.social

"The Unbearable Pain of Leaving Gaza"

Our remarkable colleague Abubaker Abed never wanted to leave his homeland. In a deeply personal essay, he describes the excruciating decisions he was forced to make.

www.dropsitenews.com/p/abubaker-a...

In an exclusive interview, Mohammed Al-Hindi of Palestinian Islamic Jihad said Israel is deluding itself into believing it can defeat the Palestinian cause. 

Al-Hindi and other PIJ leaders almost never speak to Western journalists. Full story @dropsitenews.com 🔽
www.dropsitenews.com/p/islamic-ji...

The attack on Ben Gurion Airport, the downing of U.S. drones, and attacks on naval vessels show that Ansar Allah (the Houthis) has remained resilient despite months of bombing.

www.dropsitenews.com/p/houthis-an...

You can also listen to my full interview with senior Hamas official Osama Hamdan and read the transcript of our conversation here:
www.dropsitenews.com/p/osama-hamd...

🚨 How Hamas Sees the Current Moment: I sat down with senior Hamas official Osama Hamdan for a wide-ranging interview 🔽
www.dropsitenews.com/p/osama-hamd...

Here is the full video discussion I had with Mohammad Alsaafin about the ongoing Gaza genocide, the "ceasefire" talks, why disarmament is a "red line" and about the legacies of Hamas leader Yahya Sinwar and Al Qassam Brigades commander Mohammed Deif.
www.youtube.com/live/wGSbAOX...

Status of the Gaza ceasefire talks: Israel, via Arab mediators, is pushing for a short term deal with only loose language about it leading to a potential end of the war. Hamas is offering a proposal for a comprehensive, multi-year truce & detailed responses to Israel's positions.

⚡️New Gaza Ceasefire Proposal Contains “Red Lines” for Hamas on Continued Israeli Occupation and Disarmament.

We obtained a draft of a deal currently being pushed by the U.S., Egypt, and Qatar. Hamas insists it will not capitulate to Netanyahu’s new demands.

www.dropsitenews.com/p/new-gaza-c...

🚨A sweeping crackdown on posts on Instagram and Facebook that are critical of Israel—or even vaguely supportive of Palestinians—was directly orchestrated by the government of Israel, according to internal Meta data obtained by @dropsitenews.com 
www.dropsitenews.com/p/leaked-dat...

⚡Top Houthi Official Tells Drop Site Yemen Will Cease Attacks on U.S. Ships if Trump Halts Bombing

New report from Shuaib Almosawa and me
www.dropsitenews.com/p/houthi-uni...

NEW: British lawyers representing Hamas just filed a legal case challenging its UK designation as a terror group. They charge the UK is aiding the Gaza genocide, undermining the right to armed resistance & stifling debate in the UK about Hamas’s aims and actions.
www.dropsitenews.com/p/hamas-terr...

With the House Eyeing Another Iran WPR Vote, Pro-Israel Democrats Explore Routes to Delay  (by Julian Andreone). Anti-war advocates have openly speculated about whether the Democratic establishment would deliberately allow the war to drag on to benefit the party politically in the 2026 midterm elections.
Refineries hit in Kuwait, Haifa; Israel assassinates two Iranian military officials; Al-Aqsa closed for Eid prayers for the first time since 1967 (by Drop Site News)
Afghans Search for Missing Family Members After Strike on Rehab Center Kills At Least 400 (by Emran Feroz)
Iran hits Gulf oil facilities with retaliatory strikes; Global energy markets shaken; Lebanon death toll tops 1,000 (by Drop Site News)

Grieving Parents in Iran Spend Every Night at the Graves of Their Children, Killed by U.S. Strike (by mahmoud aslan). As Ramadan comes to a close, families in Minab, Iran struggle to come to terms with the scale of death, one of the deadliest single attacks on children in memory.
Israel strikes largest Iranian gas field, central Beirut; What AIPAC got for $22 million in Illinois; U.S. hits Iran missiles sites near Strait of Hormuz (by Drop Site News)

As Israel Calls for an Uprising in Iran, Basij Militias Vow to Crush Opposition to the State (by Drop Site News). Israel assassinated the head of the Basij and has been bombing its checkpoints across Iran.

The Iran War Rages On: Israeli Assassination Strikes, Steve Witkoff's Texts, and the Mounting Storm in the Strait of Hormuz (by Drop Site News). Jeremy Scahill and Ryan Grim discuss the latest with Foad Izadi and and Emran Feroz.
Israel says it killed top Iranian security official; Pakistan bombing kills hundreds in Kabul; Cuba hit by blackout amid Trump blockade (by Drop Site News)
As the Gulf Burns, Political Uncertainty Looms Over Iraq (by Drop Site News). Nouri al-Maliki, the former prime minister, is grooming himself for another stint in power as war consumes Iraq.

Israel Killed Over a Dozen Lebanese Paramedics in Three Days, Now Claiming That Ambulances Are “Hezbollah” Targets (by Lylla Younes). Among the most targeted groups of Israel’s expanded war on Lebanon have been medical workers. Hezbollah’s Islamic Health Authority has been the hardest hit.

Iranian Officials Say They Have Been Ignoring Witkoff's Private Requests to Talk. Trump's special envoy has been texting Iran’s foreign minister asking to start talks. Tehran says the war will end only when Iran believes it has established long-term deterrence.
Trump struggles to secure Strait of Hormuz; Israel launches ground invasion of Lebanon; North Korea conducts new missile tests (by Drop Site News)
15,000 targets struck in Iran, Hegseth says; Lebanon is near a “breaking point”; U.S. temporarily lifts Russian oil sanctions (by Drop Site News)

Behind the Bombs, New Details Emerge on Iran’s Infiltration of Israel. As arrests grow in Israel, internal Iranian intelligence materials reviewed by Drop Site shed light on Tehran’s clandestine attempts to turn Israeli citizens into spies.
